transcript.text:
Greetings to the townspeople,
Our Korean melon market is diminishing due to COVID19
A lady from Seoul came by claiming that she is good at eating Korean melons
Oh by the way, she says she can eat over 1kg of pork belly without struggling
Oh My God..
Rumor #1: I heard she can eat 13 bowls of Black Bean Noodles
That person is here today?
Good Lord.. I can't even eat 1 bowl of that
I have never heard of a lady eating 6 servings of Pork Belly
*The Seoul Lady
Hello everyone
I am here at Seongju today
It's Korean melon season right now
As many of you guys know, a lot of people are affected by this pandemic
I also heard that our Korean melon market is not doing well
So I will harvest them and eat them!

Hoping I can put smiles on some faces
*North Gyeongsang Province, South Korea [Seongju County]
*Tzuyang visited Seongju County hoping to be a help and to show support for the farmers that work hard during the global epidemic
*But first, we have to eat first
She's going to eat more after that
*Starting the mukbang
I am here to help harvest the Korean melons
They prepared 1kg of Pork Belly and 1kg of Pork Jowl for me so that I will have the energy to do some physical labor!
I have to work hard later so I will only eat 2kg.
Are they known for having delicious pork meat? It tastes amazing
You're so pretty!
Eat a lot~
Advertise our Korean melons
Eat a lot and work hard!
That looks delicious
Did they bring out their best quality of meat? It's so good

It's actually the best
*Pickled Korean Melon
I love the scent
Let's get a lettuce wrap
*We filmed safely with masks, temperature detector, hand-sanitizers
We were all very discouraged from what has been happening lately
But we are all happy that the lady came by to show support
*Nothing but good vibes with Tzuyang's mukbang!
*Who's here?
*Unbelievable sight
That's amazing
Is Tzuh nyang(?) doing mukbang?
She's so skinny and she eats so much
Do you need us to help you?
You can't eat all of that by yourself
*Ahjusshis here to the rescue

Cut them in big pieces
Cameraman: She can eat all of that by herself
Do you have a death wish?
I can eat it all..
*I am only eating because I want to help
*She is sharing her food with the elders
Hey princess, darling,
There's a lot of work to be done after this meal
So eat a lot!
She's awesome!
*1 more strip
*1 mouthful
Stop eating meat now. Do something else
I haven't even gotten started yet!
Do you come out on the news at 9 o'clock?
News?

I'm not sure
Get out of here. It's our turn to eat with the lady
Maybe I can get a bite from her
I only ate 2 pieces
*The village is full of laughter thanks to Tzuyang
The meat tastes really good!
It's good
She knows how to eat!
I'm getting full by watching you eat
My son can eat really well too
You should've brought your son here. He's still single
*Her son walking by
Come here! Come here!
*Son, you had a plan all along
She's so pretty
Make eye contact for 5 seconds

*Grabs popcorn
Start!
*Fail
You feeling something!?
Is it tickling you!?
*Proud mom moments
How about this man right here?
*Competition
Give me some chopsticks
I will clean this up for you
Scoot closer
*Everyone is having fun except for these 3
Is it usually warm here like how it is today? It's been really cold.
It was cold in the morning
*In between Winter and Spring
*My sides are getting really cold...

He needs to appeal himself more. What a wimp
*Frustrated
How is he ever going to get married like that?
Have fun
I don't even feel like I ate anything
Will I have the energy to work?
Are you almost done eating now?
What? No
It's time to go do some work now
Let's go!
*Time to work
My meat! You can finish that later
*Don't worry about the meat
*Youtube mukbang fanatic
*Hello, I'm a new mukbang youtuber!
*Like and Subscribe please

*Time to do some work!
I picked out that outfit for you
It looks really good
You like it? Yes
Cool shoes too
*Tzuyang here to help the farmers affected by COVID19
It's really hot in here
There's no wind in here. It's really hot!
*It was exhausting but Tzuyang got to learn the joy of a valuable harvest
It is all from the farmers' blood and sweat
We all have to think about that when we eat a delicious fruit and be thankful
It is a precious Korean melon
Wow it's big!
*First bite of the previous Korean melon she harvested
It's really delicious
Eating this after sweating so much

It's really sweet!
*Re-energized after eating the melon
Let's do a little bit more and we'll take a break for a bit
A snack break?
After we do a little bit more work
*Guaranteed quality you can taste with fertile soil and abundant sunshine
*Seongju county proudly accounts for 75% of the nation's melon production (Yellow Korean Melons)
*We genuinely support farmers across the world who are struggling due to COVID19
Wow what is all this? There's bulgogi too!
*Snack Time!
You have to eat a lot!
Thank you so much~
*Korean Melon Bulgogi (marinated thinly sliced beef)
*Korean Melon Cold Noodles
*Korean Melon Radish Kimchi
*Korean Melon Rice Balls

*Korean Melon Sandwich
*Flexing all the dishes with Korean Melon!
Everything is made with Korean melon!
And rice wine!
The sandwich is also made with Korean melon
*Casually preparing the rice wine
Isn't it done like this too?
Then it will explode!
Try some of the Korean melon kimchi
*First time trying the Korean melon radish cube kimchi
If you put the Korean melon in the dishes, it is very clean and refreshing
It's very sweet! I love it!
*Rice balls!
Delicious, right?
*They are feeding her left and right
Try some of that sandwich!

Lots are ingredients were used for that
It's very good!
*You gotta have some rice wine after physical labor
I will pour for you
It's amazing how it didn't explode, right?
It's shaken well and it's not exploding
Can I have some too?
*Bottoms up!
It's shaken up really well. It's perfect!
*Time for the cold noodles!
You are so good at cooking!
*Bulgogi on top of the cold noodles
*Not a previous footage
What are you doing? haha
*Nom Nom
*Finishing up with the sweet Korean melon

She is so good at eating
That crunch. I want to eat some too now
*Time for Korean melon slushie
*Perfect palate cleanser
Korean melons are good for pregnant women,
Why? because it helps
The growth of the fetus... the smooth process..
Uhh.. the... yeah
*Korean melons: -Rich in folic acid, preventing anemia, birth defects, etc. -Contains cucurbitacin which is excellent for anti-cancer effects -It contains beta-carotene which is good for liver functions and heart disease
*Delicious and good for your health!
*Mukbang grandfather is going home
*He's coming back
*He is giving her money
No No No I can't No No!
Take it!
Thank you so much!

*Happy, Embarrassed, Thankful, Awkward, Apologetic
Thank you..
*Manly, Tough-guy. "I had fun"
*He gave her 50,000 won
I came to Seongju today
Harvested some Korean melons myself
Ate really delicious food made with Korean melons,
I used to eat fruits without thinking too much
But now I will remember the hard work these farmers have put in for us to eat these previous fruits
And also, I had no idea you can make so many dishes with the Korean melons
They all seemed very strange at first, but it was amazing when I got to taste them!
Even better than how they are normally made
It was a very cool and different experience for me overall
Thanks everyone~
*Epilogue
*Visited the Korean Melon Education Center

*Thank you for the food!
*A special thanks to everyone that helped and took part with filming this video.
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
